steps.title: Focus on the documentation method
steps.content: The question asks how Carmen Whitaker documents the Great Migration, so the relevant note is the one about method. It says she narrates the personal journeys of Mabel Jean Garner and Richard Preston Hale, among others. The answer should connect those individual journeys to the broader historical subject.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant emphases
steps.content: Choice A mentions Mabel Jean Garner, but it only says her journey is featured and shifts attention to the book being award-winning. Choice C gives background about Milwaukee during the Great Migration. Choice D focuses entirely on the book's 2011 awards. None of these choices explains Whitaker's method of documentation.

steps.title: Choose the method sentence
steps.content: Choice B states that Whitaker chronicles the Great Migration in personal detail by narrating the journeys of individuals, including Mabel Jean Garner and Richard Preston Hale. That directly uses the notes to emphasize how she documents the period. The answer is B.
